name: Maple Nut Drops
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease cookie sheets. Cook maple syrup and sweetened condensed milk in a heavy pan for about 3 minutes, until thickened. Be careful not to scorch. Cool slightly and stir in graham cracker crumbs, vanilla extract, and chopped nuts. Drop the mixture from a teaspoon onto prepared pans. Bake for 15 minutes. Remove from the pans immediately. Cookies will become hard if overbaked. Store them in a jar to soften. Use sweetened condensed milk as specified; results may vary with evaporated milk.
